$Comment: Looping melee attack driver shared by the Seeker and Watched Dummy. Uses the engine's Hytale.Instruction.AttackSequence instruction, which re-arms/cycles its Attack actions each combat cycle. A plain instruction with a single Type:Attack action only fires once per activation (one swing per state entry); this instruction is what makes the NPC keep attacking while the target stays in range. Reads the LockedTarget slot, which is both the wave force-marked slot (ObjectiveService) and the default target slot self-acquired NPCs lock onto.

AttackDistance.Description: The distance at which the NPC executes attacks

CombatRelativeTurnSpeed.Description: Modifier that decides turn speed difference in combat

Attack.Description: Root melee interaction; runs the role's Melee_Start (swing) and Melee_Damage vars

Content.$Comment: Range is AttackDistance+1 (not AttackDistance) because the Seek that closes the gap uses StopDistance=AttackDistance; gating the swing at exactly the stop distance leaves the NPC parked just outside the sensor and it never swings. No LineOfSight filter: force-marked objectives (workbench/fence altars) sit at/behind barrier blocks, so requiring LOS stopped the NPC from ever attacking them.
